phrases.intent_en: Ask where the maritime museum entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la entrada del museo naval?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh SEH ehn-koo-EHNT-rah LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEHL moo-SEH-oh nah-BAHL

likely_response.local: Al lado de la torre, puerta de cristal.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL LAH-doh DEH LAH TOHR-reh poo-EHR-tah DEH kree-STAHL
likely_response.translation_en: The entrance is next to the main ticket office.

responses.english: The entrance is next to the main ticket office.
responses.phonetic: AHL LAH-doh DEH LAH TOHR-reh poo-EHR-tah DEH kree-STAHL
responses.french: Al lado de la torre, puerta de cristal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la taquilla?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah?

likely_response.local: Junto a la puerta principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket office is at the right side entrance.

responses.english: The ticket office is at the right side entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto a la puerta principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the staircase to the top is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde están las escaleras para subir?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh es-TAHN las es-kah-LAH-rehs PAH-rah soo-BEER?

likely_response.local: Tras la taquilla, escalera de caracol a la
likely_response.pronunciation: TRAHS LAH tah-k-EEL-lah eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH kah-rah-KOHL AH LAH
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: TRAHS LAH tah-k-EEL-lah eh-skah-LEH-rah DEH kah-rah-KOHL AH LAH
responses.french: Tras la taquilla, escalera de caracol a la

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best river view spot is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿desde dónde se ve mejor el río?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DEHS-deh DOHN-deh seh veh meh-HOHR el REE-oh?

likely_response.local: En el mirador superior, junto a la ventana.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL mee-rah-DOHR soo-peh-ree-OHR HOON-toh AH LAH behn-TAH-nah
likely_response.translation_en: At the upper viewpoint, next to the window.

responses.english: At the upper viewpoint, next to the window.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL mee-rah-DOHR soo-peh-ree-OHR HOON-toh AH LAH behn-TAH-nah
responses.french: En el mirador superior, junto a la ventana.
